message:
feat(responses): typed JSON structs, versioned envelope, workspace metadata

Implement Proposals #8, #6, and #5 together as a cohesive change:

- #8: Replace all ad-hoc serde_json::json! objects with typed
  #[derive(Serialize)] response structs in new src/responses.rs module.
  Centralizes schema_version constant. Structs: ListEnvelope, ListItem,
  InfoResponse, ProviderInfo, ResumeSuccess, ErrorEnvelope.

- #6: Wrap list --json output in versioned envelope
  { schema_version: 2, items: [...] }. Each item also carries its own
  schema_version for record-level robustness. Empty case handled.

- #5: Add workspace_name and workspace_name_source to list and info
  JSON outputs. Derived from session workspace path (basename).

Update all JSON contract tests and CLI e2e tests to validate the new
envelope structure, per-item schema_version, and workspace metadata fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
